---
ID: US-SLD-065
Title: Improve Editor UX for Layer Selection, Grouping, and Ordering
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want cleaner layer operations and keyboard-first controls
So editing feels like a design tool instead of manual DOM management

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Selection behavior is predictable and clear in dense layer scenarios.
- [ ] Group and ungroup actions are supported.
- [ ] Z-index ordering controls are available and stable.
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts cover primary layer operations.
- [ ] Layers panel reflects grouping and structural hierarchy correctly.
